items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Tech Fest sale, Best Buy is offering ASUS’ Vivobook S 16 3K OLED AMD-powered Copilot+ PC down at $949.99 shipped. Also, Best Buy Plus and Total members will receive a $50 bonus reward credit with this purchase – or any PC or Mac priced above $499, for a limited time. This particular configuration with AMD’s Ryzen AI 9 365 processor, 24GB of RAM, and a 1TB SSD typically sells for $1,500, so you’re looking at a straight-up $550 discount right now. Today’s deal also drops it $50 below its previous all-time low and our mention from last month, marking a new best price to date. It’s also a particularly solid price to snag this machine at, considering the same laptop with a relatively less powerful Ryzen AI 7 350 processor and 16GB RAM itself is currently going for $1,229 at Amazon. It remains one of the most powerful laptops you can get your hands on right now, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
